title: Naomi Youngson
content:
President, MT❯Corporate
People.ContactEmail nyoungson@mtcorporate.ca
Naomi Youngson leads the firm’s division, MT❯Corporate, which streamlines corporate maintenance, saving clients time, money, and the administrative burden of managing external agents.
Naomi is also responsible for innovating all programs relating to paraprofessionals across the firm. In her role, she identifies and implements programs, processes and tools that drive innovation and excellence in the paraprofessional cohort and enhance the delivery of client services. Naomi brings her business law practice experience and over 20 years of experience delivering innovation, client solutions, technology adoption and process improvement to her work.
Naomi holds both a Bachelor of Commerce and Bachelor of Law from University of British Columbia.
